captured_from: Hand-synthesized from case-ok-line-1.txt by replacing the line 1 sentinel SHA with the SHA-256 of CLAUDE.md (a different committed file)
notes: Sentinel is present on line 1 but carries a SHA that does not match expected_sha. Exercises the `mismatch` route: verify_reviewer_output should return ('mismatch', observed_sha_in_fixture). The expected_sha is the orchestrator's pre-dispatch expectation (the artifact's real SHA, identical to case-ok-line-1); the observed SHA was sourced via `sha256sum CLAUDE.md` per the spec's instruction to use sha256sum (NOT git hash-object, which emits 40-hex SHA-1).
